overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit city district. The player character moves from an open commercial sidewalk past holographic billboards and a distinctive hotel, crosses an intersection, passes a building with iconic red neon lip signage, and enters a covered pedestrian underpass with distinctive teal and orange structural beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with hotel and office buildings

events.description: white van drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, passing parked cars and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with purple HOTEL signage and green-tinted windows
tall skyscraper with large rotating holographic advertisements in purple and pink
brutalist concrete building with geometric facade patterns
futuristic street lamp with glowing orange light fixture
tropical palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic urban commercial district. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, passing a green hotel building on the right and a brutalist concrete office block on the left. In the distance, a towering skyscraper displays large holographic advertisements. A white van drives past on the road, and pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk.

events.description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection
slight turn to the right while continuing forward to align with the crossing path

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians, maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner then crossing the street

entered.detail: white painted zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
building with distinctive vertical red neon lip-shaped signage
teal and orange elevated pedestrian bridge with stair access

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera crosses the street along white crosswalk lines. The hotel building falls behind while a distinctive building with red neon lip signage becomes visible on the right. An elevated teal and orange pedestrian walkway looms ahead. Pedestrians cross in various directions, and the holographic billboard tower grows larger in the center of the frame.

events.description: approaching the shadow cast by the elevated walkway structure, light becomes slightly dappled

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the covered underpass entrance, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: teal and yellow stairway leading up to the elevated pedestrian bridge
structural support beams of the covered walkway in teal and orange colors

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk toward the covered underpass, the camera passes the distinctive building with red neon lip signage now prominent on the right. The holographic billboard shifts to the left side of the frame. Teal and orange structural elements of the approaching covered walkway dominate the center view, with stairs visible on the left leading upward. Digital advertising kiosks appear on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with structural beams

events.description: entering the covered underpass area with teal and orange structural beams overhead
moving deeper into the underpass where artificial fluorescent lighting becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: walking into and through the covered underpass, moving from bright sunlight into the sheltered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful outfit walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: overhead concrete ceiling with exposed teal and orange truss structure
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling beams
large square concrete support columns lining the walkway
stairway with yellow safety markings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered underpass, transitioning from bright natural sunlight to a mixed lighting environment with overhead fluorescent tubes. The teal and orange structural beams form a distinctive geometric pattern overhead. Concrete pillars line the walkway, and the open sky is replaced by a concrete ceiling. The holographic billboard and neon building are left behind as the camera moves deeper into the sheltered pedestrian corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a bright, futuristic commercial district that gradually transitions into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins on a sunny concrete sidewalk, moving past a green hotel and a brutalist office block while a towering holographic billboard looms in the distance. As the camera crosses a wide intersection along white crosswalk lines, the hotel recedes and a building with distinctive red neon lip signage emerges on the right. The scene then shifts toward a covered walkway, passing digital advertising kiosks and stairs as the holographic tower slides to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera enters the underpass, where the bright natural sunlight is replaced by overhead fluorescent tubes and a geometric ceiling of teal and orange structural beams.
